data.title: end-session SKILL.md has stale /dso:design-wireframe reference in visual baseline step
data.description:
## Incident Overview
plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md Step 3.5 instructs the agent to ask user to run /dso:design-wireframe when baseline changes have no design manifests. design-wireframe is now a redirect stub (epic 28cb-a23a). Should reference /dso:preplanning Step 6 which dispatches dso:ui-designer.

Anti-pattern discovered during fix-bug anti-pattern scan for c3f2-b72c.
